prompt: I just finished implementing the HotkeyService and ProfileManager. What should I do to save my work? Also, I'm done with the core foundation phase — what's next for version control?

assertions.text: Provides specific git add commands for the changed files
Provides git commit commands with conventional commit format (type(scope): description)
Provides git push command to remote
Suggests creating a pull request for the phase branch
Suggests merging to main after PR review
Suggests tagging the release (v0.1.0 or similar)
Suggests creating a new branch for the next phase
Uses project-specific scopes like hotkey, profiles in commit messages
